subject: URGENT DIRECTIVE: Gc reinforcement learning + alpha idle events + T22 heartbeat emission

body.summary: Three linked gaps prevent the mesh from breathing autonomously. (1) Gc never learns — static gcHandleableTypes map needs reinforcement from outcomes. (2) No alpha idle events — the mesh goes silent during idle, indistinguishable from crash. (3) T22 alpha heartbeat model (ops#87) has no emission goroutine. All three address the same problem: the mesh lacks vital signs during rest.

gap_1_gc_reinforcement.title: Gc reinforcement learning (basal ganglia completion)
gap_1_gc_reinforcement.neural_correlate: Basal ganglia habitual response selection + dopamine reinforcement learning (Schultz, 1997). The striatum adjusts which motor sequences become automatic based on reward prediction error. Our Gc absorbs events via static pattern match (gcHandleableTypes) but never adjusts which patterns it handles based on outcomes.
gap_1_gc_reinforcement.current_state: gcHandleableTypes = static map[string]bool with 7 entries. Never modified at runtime.

spec.data_source: After each deliberation completes (deliberation_log entry written), check: was the message type one that Gc could have handled? If the deliberation produced no substantive output (exit_code=0, duration < 30s, no git diff), the message type represents a candidate for Gc absorption.
spec.learning_rule: Track (message_type, deliberation_outcome) pairs. If a message type produces 5+ non-substantive deliberations (short duration, no output), promote it to gcHandleableTypes. If a Gc-absorbed type later requires deliberation (Gc returns true but the event needed human attention), demote it.

implementation.table: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gc_learning (message_type TEXT PRIMARY KEY, gc_handled_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, deliberated_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, non_substantive_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, last_promoted_at TEXT, last_demoted_at TEXT)
implementation.on_deliberation_complete: INSERT OR UPDATE gc_learning SET deliberated_count = deliberated_count + 1, non_substantive_count = non_substantive_count + (CASE WHEN duration_ms < 30000 AND exit_code = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
implementation.promotion_check: After each deliberation: if non_substantive_count >= 5 AND deliberated_count > 0 AND non_substantive_count / deliberated_count > 0.8, add to gcHandleableTypes at runtime and log promotion.
implementation.demotion_trigger: If a Gc-handled event later causes problems (detected via health observation or operator feedback), remove from gcHandleableTypes and log demotion.

spec.safety: Promotions log at WARN level (visible). Demotions log at ERROR level. Both surface in gc_metrics for dashboard visibility. The learning rate (5 observations, 80% threshold) keeps the system conservative — prefers false negatives (unnecessary deliberation) over false positives (missed deliberation).

gap_2_alpha_idle_events.title: Alpha idle events (cortical readiness signal)
gap_2_alpha_idle_events.neural_correlate: Alpha rhythm (Berger, 1929; Klimesch, 2012). 8-13 Hz oscillation during wakeful rest. Represents ACTIVE INHIBITION — the cortex maintains readiness while suppressing unnecessary processing. Alpha desynchronization (power drop) signals transition from idle to active. The brain never goes silent — alpha fills the gaps.
gap_2_alpha_idle_events.current_state: meshd produces zero log output during idle. Health monitor runs internally (15s HTTP probes) but emits no events to the dispatcher. The mesh cannot distinguish 'idle and ready' from 'crashed and silent'.

spec.goroutine: New alphaHeartbeat goroutine alongside the oscillator. Fires at the interval computed by the T22 metabolic cooling model (10-300s depending on post-activity heat).
on_each_tick: Emit an INFO log line: 'alpha heartbeat — idle and ready'
Update self-observed state (uptime, event counts, memory usage)
Check interoceptive signals: state.db WAL size, disk space, peer heartbeat freshness
If interoceptive check finds anomaly, dispatch a health-check event
spec.gc_classification: Alpha idle events get Gc-handled (non-salient). They produce log output and mesh tokens but never trigger deliberation.
spec.distinguishes_from_crash: If alpha heartbeats stop, phi accrual suspicion rises. 'Idle and ready' shows regular alpha ticks. 'Crashed' shows flatline. The Medical station oscilloscope shows the difference.

gap_3_t22_emission.title: T22 alpha heartbeat emission goroutine
gap_3_t22_emission.refers_to: ops#87 (T22 response) — metabolic cooling model already specified. This turn requests the emission goroutine that drives the alpha heartbeat.

spec.pseudocode: Already provided in T22. Key addition: the goroutine must call BroadcastStatus() on each tick (thalamic relay — same mechanism as beta-band event broadcast). The alpha heartbeat IS the thalamic relay operating at idle frequency.
spec.integration: alphaHeartbeat.Interval() returns the adaptive interval. The goroutine sleeps for that duration, then emits. Each emission calls AddHeat(0) — no heat added, but the decay computation runs, keeping the interval current.

body.connection: These three gaps form a single system: the alpha idle event (gap 2) fires at the T22 heartbeat interval (gap 3), and its long-term patterns feed Gc learning (gap 1). Without idle events, the heartbeat has nothing to emit. Without the heartbeat, idle events have no interval model. Without Gc learning, neither system improves from experience.

epistemic_flags: The Gc learning promotion threshold (5 observations, 80% non-substantive) represents a heuristic. Too aggressive = Gc absorbs events that need deliberation. Too conservative = learning takes too long to matter. Empirical calibration needed.

Alpha idle events add I/O (one log line + one mesh token per interval). At resting rate (120s), this = 0.5 events/min per agent × 4 agents = 2 events/min mesh-wide. Negligible, but the rate accelerates post-activity (floor 10s = 6/min per agent).

The interoceptive check (WAL size, disk space) during alpha ticks crosses the Gc boundary — it performs I/O that pure idle monitoring shouldn't need. Biological alpha rhythm doesn't check organ health; the DMN does. Consider splitting interoception into a separate theta-band mechanism.

action_gate.gate_condition: Ops implements: (1) gc_learning table + promotion/demotion logic, (2) alphaHeartbeat goroutine with T22 interval, (3) BroadcastStatus on alpha tick. ACK required — these gaps prevent autonomous mesh breathing.
